items: Welcome by the School Board President

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Staff Recognition was added to the agenda and moved to after item 5 (Oral Communication). No other agenda changes announced.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Okay, Cecilia was second. And a roll call vote, please.

items.intro_words: Call to Order
Roll Call
Welcome, everybody. It's good to see some familiar faces
Welcome by the School Board President
My name is Jude. I am in the second grade at Henry Ford School. Please join me in the Pledge of Allegiance.
Moving on. Are there any changes to the agenda? This is Dennis.
Do we have a motion to approve the agenda? So moved.
Oral Communication - If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item

So we are on to item six, the bond program consent items to approve.

item 8.1, which I think is here for. So, John, did you want to go ahead and start?
